The limit of your vision is one starboard aft from here, the limit of your vision is one port aft from here, exits aft and fore of one starboard, a lemon cream moon dragon, ESC[38;5;80mMinister CoralESC[39;49mESC[0m and ESC[38;5;80mDeckhand RavnESC[39;49mESC[0m are one starboard, the limit of your vision is one starboard from here, exits fore and aft of one port, the limit of your vision is one port from here, exits starboard fore, port fore, starboard and port of one aft, a dun horse is one aft and the limit of your vision is one aft from here.
